rules.name: FDA Form 1572 Missing
rules.description: FDA Form 1572 (Statement of Investigator) must be on file for every activated site before any trial activity begins.
rules.details: FDA Form 1572 is a legal commitment by the investigator to conduct the study according to regulatory requirements. It must be signed and on file before site initiation and updated after each protocol amendment.

rules.name: Delegation Log Missing or Outdated
rules.description: A current Delegation of Authority Log must be on file for every activated site, listing all staff authorized to perform study-related tasks.
rules.details: The Delegation Log documents which site staff are authorized to perform study-specific tasks. It must be signed by the Principal Investigator and updated whenever staff changes occur.

rules.name: IRB Approval Missing
rules.description: Current IRB or Ethics Committee approval must be documented for every activated site.
rules.message_template: Missing IRB Approval documentation for Site {site_code}
rules.details: Institutional Review Board approval is mandatory before any study activity at the site. The approval letter must reference the current protocol version.

rules.name: Investigator CV Missing
rules.description: Principal Investigator Curriculum Vitae must be on file at each activated site.
rules.details: The Investigator CV confirms the PI qualifications to conduct the trial. It must be current (typically within 2 years) and signed.

rules.name: Protocol Not on File
rules.description: The current approved protocol version must be available for each site.
rules.message_template: Study protocol not found in TMF for Site {site_code}
rules.details: The approved protocol version must be accessible to site staff. Inspectors verify that site activities align with the protocol version on file.

rules.name: Monitoring Visit Report Missing
rules.description: Sites with enrolled subjects must have at least one monitoring visit report on file.
rules.message_template: No monitoring visit report on file for Site {site_code}
rules.details: Per ICH E6 GCP guidelines, the sponsor must monitor all sites with enrolled subjects. A monitoring visit report documenting oversight activities must be filed in the TMF.

rules.name: SAE Follow-Up Documentation Missing
rules.description: Sites with enrolled subjects must have SAE follow-up documentation when serious adverse events have been reported.
rules.message_template: SAE follow-up documentation missing for Site {site_code}
rules.details: All serious adverse events must have timely follow-up reports filed in the TMF. Missing SAE follow-up is a critical inspection finding that demonstrates inadequate patient safety monitoring.

rules.name: Informed Consent Form Missing
rules.description: The current approved Informed Consent Form must be on file at sites with enrolled subjects.
rules.message_template: Informed Consent Form missing for Site {site_code}
rules.details: A current IRB-approved Informed Consent Form must be on file. Inspectors verify that patients signed the version that was approved at the time of consent.

rules.name: Site Initiation Visit Report Missing
rules.description: A Site Initiation Visit (SIV) report must be on file for all activated sites.
rules.message_template: Site Initiation Visit report missing for Site {site_code}
rules.details: The SIV report documents that the site has been trained and assessed as ready to conduct the trial. Required before first patient enrollment.

rules.name: Unsigned Key Document Detected
rules.description: A key regulatory document is on file but lacks a detectable signature.
rules.message_template: Unsigned or incomplete document detected at Site {site_code}
rules.details: Unsigned regulatory documents are a common inspection finding. All key TMF documents — especially the 1572, Delegation Log, and Consent Forms — must bear investigator or sponsor signatures.
